# discord_stage_instance (Resource)

Manages a live stage instance on a Discord stage channel.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_stage_instance" "town_hall" {
  channel_id    = "123456789012345678"
  topic         = "Weekly Town Hall"
  privacy_level = 2
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the stage channel the stage instance lives on.
- `topic` (String) Topic of the stage instance (the headline shown to listeners).

### Optional

- `privacy_level` (Number) Privacy level of the stage instance (`1` public, `2` guild-only). Defaults to `2`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Snowflake ID of the stage instance.
